subcodes.first_line: If the concealed command, which is fundamental yet deemed imaginary, be mentioned anywhere, or if reference be made to any station or to the knowledge of all things, it is by virtue of the majesty of the station of Divine Unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو العلی المتکبر. امر مستور که رکن است موهوم تصور شود اگر در جائی ذکر مقامی یا علم بکل شیء ذکر شده بواسطه عظمة مقام توحید بوده
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
